This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Shared WebAssembly.Memory from window to SharedWorker fires messageerror on the SharedWorker
  assert_true: SharedWorker reports crossOriginIsolated; otherwise the headers are not being honored expected true got false
[FAIL] Shared WebAssembly.Memory from SharedWorker to window fires messageerror on the window
  assert_true: SharedWorker reports crossOriginIsolated; otherwise the headers are not being honored expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
